It began as a tool to add quality-of-life functions for gameplay.

Jagex can replay every specific action a player takes, including mouse movements and clicks. This detailed replay capability helps them identify similiar non-human patterns. This is why private scripts can go undetected for a long time.

Jagex moderators have explained that detection systems improve by analyzing metrics from flagged sample accounts. This means behavior from caught accounts is studied and then used to update detection in similar areas.
Jagex uses heat maps to track player activity in different game areas. If a bot is detected in a high-traffic area, it may be flagged more quickly than in a low-traffic zone.
